integration_validation_v2.evidence: CommandCorpusEntry implements all required fields incl. foreground_flag, action_id(id), owner, params_schema_ref, capabilities, receipt_shape, errors, plus BlockedReason preconditions (src/atelier/command_corpus.rs:225-276). upsert_command_corpus_entry INSERTs into atelier_command_corpus_entry + emits event (command_corpus.rs:447-552). Test asserts foreground_flag roundtrip + event count vs real PG (tests/atelier_command_corpus_tests.rs:101-187). Note: kernel/action_catalog.rs is a separate kernel-002 catalog, not this MT.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-136 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Command Action Catalog Schema -- Implement typed action catalog entries (id
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Command Action Catalog Schema
scope.summary: MT-136 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Command Action Catalog Schema -- Implement typed action catalog entries (id, owner, params, capabilities, preconditions, side effects, receipt, errors, refs, foreground flag).
